# vCISO Engagement Kickoff Meeting
## [CLIENT NAME]

**Date:** [MM/DD/YYYY]  
**Time:** [Start Time] - [End Time] ([Duration: 90-120 minutes])  
**Location:** [On-site / Virtual Meeting Link]  
**Meeting Leader:** [vCISO Name]

---

## Meeting Objectives

By the end of this kickoff meeting, we will have:
✅ Established relationships and communication protocols  
✅ Aligned on engagement scope, deliverables, and expectations  
✅ Completed initial current-state assessment  
✅ Defined 30/60/90-day roadmap  
✅ Initiated ERMITS platform onboarding  
✅ Scheduled all recurring meetings

---

## Attendees

### Client Team (Please confirm attendance)
- [ ] **[CEO/President Name]** - Chief Executive Officer
- [ ] **[CTO/CIO Name]** - Chief Technology/Information Officer
- [ ] **[CFO Name]** - Chief Financial Officer (if applicable)
- [ ] **[Operations Lead Name]** - VP Operations / COO
- [ ] **[IT Manager Name]** - IT Manager / Director
- [ ] **[Compliance Lead Name]** - Compliance Officer (if applicable)
- [ ] **[Other Key Stakeholders]**

### ERMITS Advisory Team
- **[vCISO Name]** - Virtual Chief Information Security Officer
- **[Support Team Member]** - [Role] (if applicable)
- **[Platform Specialist Name]** - ERMITS Platform Specialist (if applicable)

---

## Pre-Meeting Preparation

### For vCISO Team:
- [ ] Review signed contract and SOW
- [ ] Review discovery call notes
- [ ] Prepare kickoff presentation
- [ ] Set up client workspace in project management tool
- [ ] Provision ERMITS platform tenant
- [ ] Prepare assessment questionnaire
- [ ] Send pre-read materials 48 hours before meeting
- [ ] Test meeting technology

### For Client Team (sent 48 hours before):
- [ ] Review engagement proposal and SOW
- [ ] Complete pre-kickoff questionnaire (if sent)
- [ ] Gather any existing security documentation:
  - Organization chart
  - IT asset inventory (if available)
  - Current policies and procedures
  - Recent audit/assessment reports
  - Compliance requirements list
  - Technology stack overview
- [ ] Prepare questions and concerns
- [ ] Confirm attendance from all key stakeholders

---

## Detailed Agenda

### 1. Welcome & Introductions (15 minutes)

#### Opening Remarks
- Welcome from client executive sponsor
- Introduction of ERMITS Advisory vCISO

#### Round-Table Introductions
Each person shares:
- Name and role
- Responsibilities related to security/IT
- Top security concern or priority
- Communication preference (email/Slack/Teams/phone)

**Parking Lot:** Keep intro board to note topics to discuss later

---

### 2. Engagement Overview (20 minutes)

#### Service Tier Review
- **Tier Selected:** [Strategic Advisory / Operational / Executive vCISO]
- **Monthly Investment:** $[Amount]
- **Time Commitment:** [X] hours per month
- **Contract Duration:** [12 months from MM/DD/YYYY to MM/DD/YYYY]

#### Key Deliverables
**Strategic Advisory vCISO:**
- Monthly executive strategy sessions
- Monthly executive briefing reports
- Quarterly board presentations (if applicable)
- Policy reviews and approvals
- Strategic technology guidance
- ERMITS platform strategic oversight

**Operational vCISO:**
- All Strategic deliverables plus:
- Weekly team meetings and leadership
- Security program management
- Policy and procedure development
- Incident response oversight
- Compliance program management
- Platform administration and optimization

**Executive vCISO:**
- All Operational deliverables plus:
- Daily security operations oversight
- Direct team management
- Executive committee participation
- 24/7 crisis availability
- Complete platform orchestration
- Board governance leadership

#### Communication Rhythms

| Meeting Type | Frequency | Duration | Attendees |
|--------------|-----------|----------|-----------|
| [Weekly Team Meeting] | Weekly | 90 min | Security team |
| [Executive Strategy Session] | Monthly | 90 min | Executives |
| [Board Presentation] | Quarterly | 30 min | Board of Directors |
| [Monthly Reports] | Monthly | N/A | Email distribution |
| [Quarterly Business Review] | Quarterly | 90 min | Executives |

**Ad-Hoc Communication:**
- Email response time: [Within 24 hours / 4 hours / same day]
- Urgent issues: [Phone / SMS / Emergency escalation protocol]
- Platform questions: [Slack channel / Email / Scheduled calls]

#### Escalation Procedures

**Level 1: Standard Issues**
- Contact: [vCISO Email/Slack]
- Response Time: Within 24 business hours
- Examples: Policy questions, routine approvals, planning items

**Level 2: Priority Issues**
- Contact: [vCISO Email + Phone]
- Response Time: Within 4 hours
- Examples: Medium-severity incidents, vendor issues, audit findings

**Level 3: Critical/Emergency**
- Contact: [vCISO Emergency Phone]
- Response Time: Within 2 hours (24/7 for Executive tier)
- Examples: Active breaches, system compromises, ransomware, data loss

#### Success Metrics & KPIs

**STEEL Score Improvement:**
- Baseline: [Will be established in 30-day assessment]
- Target: +15-20 points in first year
- Measurement: Quarterly STEEL reassessments

**Compliance Milestones:**
- [Framework Name]: [Target completion date]
- [Framework Name]: [Target completion date]
- Evidence collection: [XX]% automation through CyberCorrect

**Operational Metrics:**
- Mean Time to Detect (MTTD): Target <24 hours
- Mean Time to Respond (MTTR): Target <4 hours
- Vulnerability remediation: Target >95% within SLA
- Security training completion: Target 100%

**Program Maturity:**
- Advance from [Current Level] to [Target Level] in 12 months
- Policy framework: [XX] policies implemented
- Team capability: [Specific skill developments]

---

- Size: [Number] employees, $[Revenue] annual revenue

- CRM system: [System name]

- Coverage amount: $[X]

- Disaster recovery plan: [Yes / No / Outdated]

**Last Review Date:** [Date or N/A]  
**Known Gaps:** [List major missing policies]

**Past 12 Months:**
- Security incidents: [Number and types]
- Attempted breaches: [Description]
- Audit findings: [Summary]
- Vendor security issues: [If any]
- Employee security violations: [If any]
- Ransomware attempts: [Description]

**Lessons Learned:** [Key takeaways from past events]

**Current Team:**
- Security-dedicated staff: [Number and roles]
- IT staff with security responsibilities: [Number]
- Certifications held: [List]
- Training budget: [$X annually]

**Capability Gaps:**
- [Missing capability 1]
- [Missing capability 2]
- [Missing capability 3]

#### Budget & Resources

**Annual Security Budget:**
- Total security budget: $[X]
- Personnel: $[X]
- Technology: $[X]
- Professional services: $[X]
- Training: $[X]
- vCISO engagement: $[X]

**Budget Authority:**
- Budget approved by: [Role]
- Approval required for purchases >$[X]

### 4. Initial Assessment Plan (20 minutes)

#### 30-Day Assessment Activities

**Week 1-2: Discovery & Documentation**
- [ ] Executive stakeholder interviews ([Number] people, 30-60 min each)
- [ ] Security/IT team interviews ([Number] people)
- [ ] Policy and procedure documentation review
- [ ] Technology stack assessment
- [ ] Access to systems for review

**Week 3-4: Analysis & Planning**
- [ ] STEEL framework assessment execution
- [ ] Compliance gap analysis ([List frameworks])
- [ ] Risk identification and prioritization
- [ ] Quick-win identification
- [ ] 90-day roadmap development

**Assessment Deliverable (End of Week 4):**
- 30-Day Assessment Report (20-30 pages)
- STEEL composite risk score
- Top 10 risks identified
- Top 5 quick wins
- 90-day strategic roadmap
- ERMITS platform recommendations
- Resource requirement analysis

#### Information & Access Needed

**Documentation Requests:**
- [ ] Organization chart (all levels)
- [ ] IT asset inventory
- [ ] Network diagrams
- [ ] System architecture documentation
- [ ] All existing security policies
- [ ] Previous audit reports
- [ ] Vendor contracts (top 10 critical vendors)
- [ ] Incident response records (past 12 months)
- [ ] Employee training records
- [ ] Insurance policies (cyber and general liability)
- [ ] Business continuity/disaster recovery plans

**System Access Needed:**
- [ ] Read-only admin access to [Security tools]
- [ ] Access to [Cloud environment consoles]
- [ ] Access to [SIEM / logging systems]
- [ ] Access to [Vulnerability scan reports]
- [ ] Access to [Endpoint protection console]
- [ ] VPN access for remote work

**Meeting Access:**
- [ ] Weekly IT team meetings
- [ ] Monthly executive meetings
- [ ] Vendor review meetings
- [ ] Compliance committee (if exists)

#### Assessment Meeting Schedule

| Meeting | Attendee(s) | Duration | Purpose | Date/Time |
|---------|------------|----------|---------|-----------|
| CEO Interview | [CEO Name] | 60 min | Strategic priorities | [TBD] |
| CTO/CIO Interview | [CTO Name] | 90 min | Technical deep-dive | [TBD] |
| IT Manager Interview | [IT Mgr] | 60 min | Operations detail | [TBD] |
| Finance Interview | [CFO Name] | 30 min | Budget & risk | [TBD] |
| Security Team | [Team] | 90 min | Current state | [TBD] |

**Please coordinate scheduling with [Coordinator Name/Email]**

### 5. ERMITS Platform Onboarding (15 minutes)

#### Platform Overview & Demo

**ERMITS Platform Components:**

**CyberCaution (Threat Monitoring):**
- Real-time threat intelligence
- Automated alert correlation
- Industry-specific threat feeds
- Dark web monitoring
- Vulnerability tracking

**CyberCorrect (Compliance Automation):**
- Multi-framework support ([List relevant frameworks])
- Automated evidence collection
- Continuous compliance monitoring
- Audit readiness dashboards
- Gap tracking and remediation

**CyberSoluce (Governance Hub):**
- Centralized policy management
- Risk register and tracking
- Workflow automation
- GRC orchestration
- Executive dashboards

**VendorSoluce (Vendor Risk):** [If included]
- Vendor assessment automation
- Continuous monitoring
- Supply chain risk visibility
- Third-party compliance tracking

**[Sector Solution]:** [If included - MediSoluce/FinSoluce/EduSoluce]
- Industry-specific controls
- Regulatory compliance automation
- Specialized risk frameworks

#### Platform Access & Onboarding

**This Week:**
- [ ] Platform tenant provisioned
- [ ] Admin account created for vCISO
- [ ] Initial configuration started
- [ ] Platform access guide sent

**Next 2 Weeks:**
- [ ] User accounts created for team
- [ ] Role-based access configured
- [ ] Initial data migration (assets, policies)
- [ ] Dashboard customization
- [ ] Integration setup (existing tools)

**Platform Training Schedule:**
- **Admin Training:** [Date/Time] - 90 minutes
  - Platform navigation
  - User management
  - Configuration basics
- **User Training:** [Date/Time] - 60 minutes
  - Daily workflows
  - Dashboard usage
  - Evidence collection
- **Advanced Training:** [Date TBD]
  - Custom reporting
  - API integration
  - Automation configuration

#### Platform Support

**Support Resources:**
- Platform documentation: [URL]
- Video tutorials: [URL]
- Support email: platform-support@ermits.com
- Training schedule: [Weekly office hours]

**Questions about Platform:**
[Open floor for questions]

---

### 6. 30/60/90 Day Roadmap Preview (15 minutes)

#### First 30 Days: Assessment & Foundation

**Key Objectives:**
- Complete initial STEEL assessment
- Identify and implement quick wins
- Establish baseline metrics
- Build stakeholder relationships
- Deploy ERMITS platform basics

**Expected Outcomes:**
- STEEL composite risk score established
- Top 10 risks documented
- 5+ quick wins implemented
- 30-day assessment report delivered
- Platform operational with basic configuration

**Quick Win Examples:**
- MFA enforcement for all admin accounts
- Email security configuration (SPF/DKIM/DMARC)
- Password policy update
- Backup verification
- Critical patch deployment

#### Days 31-60: Strategic Planning & Platform Deployment

**Key Objectives:**
- Develop comprehensive security roadmap
- Begin policy framework development
- Full platform deployment and integration
- Compliance gap remediation planning
- Team training and capability building

**Expected Outcomes:**
- 12-month security strategy documented
- 10-15 core policies developed/updated
- Platform fully configured and integrated
- Compliance roadmap with milestones
- Team trained on new tools and processes

**Major Activities:**
- Strategic planning workshops
- Policy working sessions
- Platform data migration
- Compliance framework mapping
- Budget planning for initiatives

#### Days 61-90: Program Implementation & Optimization

**Key Objectives:**
- Implement security program improvements
- Launch compliance initiatives
- Optimize platform automation
- Measure and report early results
- Scale team capabilities

**Expected Outcomes:**
- Measurable STEEL score improvement (+5-10 points)
- 50%+ compliance automation implemented
- Incident response capability established
- First quarterly metrics reported
- Continuous monitoring operational

**Key Milestones:**
- First quarterly board presentation
- Compliance framework 30-50% complete
- Platform ROI demonstrated
- Team performing key security functions
- Budget for next quarter approved

#### Beyond 90 Days: Continuous Improvement

**Ongoing Activities:**
- Monthly executive briefings
- Quarterly STEEL assessments
- Continuous compliance monitoring
- Regular policy reviews
- Platform optimization
- Team development
- Vendor risk management
- Incident response readiness

## Post-Meeting Checklist

### Within 24 Hours:
- [ ] Send meeting notes to all attendees
- [ ] Distribute action item tracker
- [ ] Send calendar invites for all recurring meetings
- [ ] Begin system access provisioning
- [ ] Set up communication channels
- [ ] Create document repository

### Within 48 Hours:
- [ ] Schedule all assessment interviews
- [ ] Send platform access credentials
- [ ] Deliver platform training schedule
- [ ] Share initial templates and resources
- [ ] Confirm receipt of requested documentation

### Within 1 Week:
- [ ] Complete platform provisioning
- [ ] Conduct first platform training session
- [ ] Begin assessment activities
- [ ] Establish project management workspace
- [ ] Send first weekly update

## Kickoff Success Criteria

✅ All key stakeholders attended and engaged  
✅ Clear understanding of scope and deliverables  
✅ Communication protocols established  
✅ Access and documentation requests submitted  
✅ Platform onboarding initiated  
✅ 30-day roadmap understood and accepted  
✅ Positive energy and enthusiasm from client  
✅ Strong foundation for ongoing partnership
